title: Endure Extreme Stress
description: Use this oracle when you roll a miss on Endure Stress and both the Shaken and Corrupted conditions are already marked. Roll to determine the dire consequence of suffering extreme psychological harm.

data.value: Your will is shattered beyond recovery. Envision your final breakdown — this is the end of your story.
You descend into madness or despair. Without immediate intervention from an ally, you cannot recover.
A lasting psychological wound takes hold — a compulsion, phobia, or fractured sense of self. Envision the details and mark a new debility of your choosing.
You are overcome with grief or terror and cannot act. You must be comforted by an ally before you can make any move.
You retreat within yourself. You cannot make progress until you find solace and recover at least 1 spirit.
You hold yourself together through stubborn will. Suffer -1 momentum.
A thread of hope holds. Recover +1 spirit.
Something deep within you refuses to be extinguished. Take +2 momentum.
